code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1
    - Multiple unresolved issues reported in same review

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws, poor quality, missing parts, misleading description
    - Some limited usefulness but strong disappointment
    - Language such as "cheap," "useless," "not as pictured," "pain to use"
    - Functional but with major compromises

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons
    - "It's okay," "average," "not great but not terrible"
    - Works but with noticeable limitations
    - Conflicted or moderate tone
    - If sentiment is clearly mixed and neither side dominates, choose 3
    - "Does the job" without enthusiasm

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Mostly positive with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basic expectations but has clear imperfections
    - Phrases like "pretty good," "above average," "would recommend with caveats"
    - Aesthetic/design praise without functional benefits
    - Satisfied but with reservations about durability/quality
    - Performance praise with explicit limitations (e.g., "great but heavy")
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm and strong recommendation
    - Exceeds expectations in FUNCTIONAL performance
    - Transformative experience through exceptional utility
    - Sustained praise across function, design AND value
    - Minor feature gaps outweighed by core excellence
    - Surpasses comparable products through unique benefits
    - Practical disclaimers with strong satisfaction (e.g., "needs care but works perfectly")

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Explicit star ratings in text must be ignored - analyze sentiment only
    - Mixed updates: Prioritize final verdict over initial impressions
    - Sarcasm detection: Contrast between positive words and negative context
    - Multi-use success stories without drawbacks → 5
    - Temporary satisfaction with long-term doubts → 4
    - Core functionality excellence → 5 even with missing premium features
    - Durability concerns despite satisfaction → 4
    - Aesthetic praise + flawless function → 5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "It's not a good vacuum. It's hard to pick up dirt and then it will spit it out so you have to go over and over the same area. I wouldn't buy it again."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "The product works, but barely. It broke after a week of use, and customer service was unhelpful. Not worth the money."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "The cushions are okay, but the size was waaaay off for my rocker. I'm still using it though because it is better than nothing."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Vibrant blue color transformed my son's room, though the material feels thinner than premium brands. Gets daily compliments but durability concerns remain."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "This mattress gets 4 stars for comfort but 5 stars for everything else! Transformed our sleep quality despite initial concerns."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "These reusable bags held up to fabric paints and rough Halloween handling. Kids loved decorating them - exceeded all expectations!"
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "I'd rate this as pretty good although it doesn't feel quite as heavy duty as premium models. Overall above average for occasional use."
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: "The non-stick coating started peeling after 2 uses. Complete waste of money and potentially dangerous."
Rating: 1

Example 9:
Review: "Works better than expected but handles get hot. Good for quick meals though I wouldn't use it daily."
Rating: 3

Example 10:
Review: "Love how this blends frozen fruit! Buttons are stiff but results are restaurant-quality. Worth every penny!"
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (36 total misclassified):
  gold 5 -> 4: 18
  gold 4 -> 5: 10
  gold 4 -> 3: 4
  gold 3 -> 4: 1
  gold 2 -> 1: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I ended up liking this more than expected. It's not super soft but it looks good with modern yet "homespun" appearance to it. Easy to wash and goes anywhere - great to toss in the back of a sofa or chair, bring along in the car or just leave across t..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I am a fan of the DII everyday kitchen basics. The oval terry potholders are an essential item in the kitchen. When you are cooking, you will at some point need to pick a pan out of the oven or a pot off the stove and they can both burn you if you do..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Grunds bathmat is 100% certified organic cotton  with the main section being long straight cotton fibers and it has three stripes of loops on each end. This fiber is not treated with bleach, formaldehyde,  or any other harmful toxic substances. This ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This is a coffee pot for coffee geeks.  Most discerning coffee aficionados likely wouldn't notice much if any difference from a a great less complicated coffee make, such as a Bonavita.  To cut to the point, this probably isn't for you, but who knows..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I am not a fan of these disposable bags.  They are super thin plastic, and are very difficult to work with as they are super floppy.  The whole time I was concerned that the bag would burst.

Spend a bit more to get a few good quality frosting bags, ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I ordered a package of these in black for my kids and their friends to use as Trick-or-Treat bags this year. Unlike other brands of these reusable grocery bags I've bought, these are a bit more narrow, like traditional paper grocery bags are. I like ..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 36 errors, 16 borderline out of 80 examples."}
